tutorial.icon.location: Kuweka eneo lako mwenyewe na kutafuta

tutorial.quick.step2_1: Kitufe cha buluu kilichotolewa hapo juu ni kitufe cha SOS
tutorial.quick.step2_2:
Ikiwa utabonyeza, eneo lako linatumwa
   a) Kwa anwani zako zilizohifadhiwa kwenye Kitambulisho cha Matibabu
   b) Kwa huduma ya dharura iliyo karibu nawe
tutorial.quick.step2_3: Chini ya kitufe cha SOS kuna huduma za karibu zaidi na anwani zingine kwa huduma zingine
tutorial.triage.title: Nini kimetokea?
tutorial.triage.sub: Maswali mawili — tutatanguliza msaada unaofaa kwa hali yako.
tutorial.triage.alert: Jeraha limeripotiwa — Gari la wagonjwa (108) litapewa kipaumbele.
tutorial.quick.step3_1: Huu ni muunganisho ambao unaonekana wakati wa kutumia kitufe cha Kupa Kipaumbele hali yangu, piga simu eneo la huduma la karibu zaidi hapa chini
tutorial.quick.step3_2: Jibu maswali machache ya haraka kuhusu hali yako, na mfumo utatanguliza usaidizi unaohitaji kulingana na udharura na hatari inayoweza kutokea.
tutorial.quick.intro_4: Ikiwa simu yako itagundua ajali na huwezi kujibu:
tutorial.quick.step4_3: Mwasiliani wako wa dharura anapokea ujumbe
tutorial.quick.footer_4: Huna haja ya kufanya chochote. Programu inashughulikia hili.
tutorial.full.footer_1: Nukta iliyo upande wa kulia inaonyesha kama uko mtandaoni. Hata kwa mawimbi sufuri, utaona nambari za dharura kama 108, 100, 101, 112 kila wakati.
tutorial.full.lines_2_1_1: Jaza: Kundi la Damu, Mizio, Mwasiliani wa Dharura
tutorial.full.lines_2_1_2: Wahudumu wa afya wanaweza kusoma hili ikiwa huna fahamu
tutorial.full.lines_2_1_3: Hii inabaki kwenye simu yako pekee — haipakiwi kamwe
tutorial.full.heading_2_2: ② Gusa Panga Safari Nje ya Mtandao
tutorial.full.lines_2_2_1: Kama unaendesha gari mahali penye mawimbi hafifu
tutorial.full.lines_2_2_2: Hii huhifadhi hospitali na polisi kwenye njia yako
tutorial.full.lines_2_2_3: Hivyo data iko tayari kabla ya kupoteza mawimbi
tutorial.full.intro_3: Hapa kuna kile hasa cha kufanya:
tutorial.full.step3_1: Programu hupata eneo lako moja kwa moja
tutorial.full.step3_2: Jibu maswali 2 ukitumia kitufe cha Tanguliza hali yangu
tutorial.full.step4_1: Utafutaji wa moja kwa moja (unapokuwa mtandaoni)
tutorial.full.step4_3: Data yako ya safari ya nje ya mtandao
tutorial.full.step4_4: Nambari za dharura zilizojengewa ndani katika programu
tutorial.full.footer_4: Hata ukiwa na mtandao sufuri, utaona kila wakati: 📞 108 · 100 · 101 · 112. Hizi zinafanya kazi nje ya mtandao. Kila wakati.

tutorial.welcome_body: Welcome to RoadSOS. RoadSOS is a webapp that helps you to find nearby help in your time of emergency even if you are offline
tutorial.quick1_body:
See the buttons at the top of your screen?

🔄 Refresh — gets new nearby help
🌙 Dark / Light mode
🌐 Language — pick yours
📍 Set location — if GPS doesn't work
💥 Crash alert — test it
🆔 Medical ID — your health info

The little dot on the right tells you if you're connected to the internet.
tutorial.quick2_body:
The app already knows where you are.

1️⃣  Tap the big blue SOS button
2️⃣  Your location is sent to your emergency contact
3️⃣  Tap Call on the nearest hospital below

That's it. Help is on the way.
tutorial.quick3_title: It Works Even If You Can't
tutorial.quick3_body:
If your phone detects a crash and you can't respond:

⏱️  A 30-second countdown starts
📤  Your location is sent automatically
📱  Your emergency contact gets a message

You don't need to do anything. The app handles it.
tutorial.full1_body:
The top bar has 6 buttons:

🔄 Refresh — gets fresh nearby places
🌙 Dark / Light mode
🌐 Language — choose from 43 languages
📍 Manual location — use if GPS fails
💥 Crash alert — test the crash system
🆔 Medical ID — your health info for paramedics

The dot on the right shows if you're online. Even with zero signal, you'll always see emergency numbers like 108, 100, 101, 112.
tutorial.full2_body:
1️⃣  Tap the ID button
      Fill in: blood type, allergies, emergency contact
      Paramedics can read this if you're unconscious
      It stays on your phone only — never uploaded

2️⃣  Tap Plan Offline Trip
      If you're driving somewhere with bad signal
      It saves hospitals and police along your route
      So the data is ready before you lose signal
tutorial.full3_body:
Here's exactly what to do:

1️⃣  App finds your location automatically
2️⃣  Answer 2 quick questions (what happened?)
3️⃣  The app puts the best help at the top
4️⃣  Tap Call on the first result
5️⃣  Tap SOS to send your location

⏱️  Total time: under 10 seconds
tutorial.full4_body:
Your phone watches for sudden stops.

If it detects a crash:
⏱️  A 30-second countdown starts
📤  If you don't cancel, it auto-sends:
      • Your location
      • Road name
      • Crash alert

📱  Sent via SMS and WhatsApp
      to your emergency contact.

You don't need to touch anything.
tutorial.full5_body:
The app has 4 backup layers:

1️⃣  Live search (when online)
2️⃣  Saved results from last time
3️⃣  Your offline trip data
4️⃣  Emergency numbers built into the app

Even with absolutely zero internet, you'll always see:
📞 108 · 100 · 101 · 112

These work offline. Always.
tutorial.full6_body:
We have a video that shows how crash detection works in real life.

Want to watch it?
